goal: Validate bounded multi-agent execution for a general repository consistency review task.
strategy: Split evidence verification and synthesis into small bounded tasks so one worker never needs the full repository context.

jobs.title: Verify goal and checklist anchors
jobs.instruction: Research and verify that the goal doc and checklist doc describe bounded execution and recovery guardrails.
jobs.success_check: The selected docs and schema can be cited as bounded execution anchors.

jobs.title: Synthesize generic task validation summary
jobs.instruction: Synthesize a concise summary of how the repository validates generic bounded tasks without overfocusing on one domain example.
jobs.success_check: The summary can stay grounded in the selected files and bounded task rules.
